Text: Jamie worked directly for me for many years. He is extremely knowledgeable in all aspects of network, facilities and telecommunications technology and is one of the better mentors and team managers I have ever worked with. He takes the time to provide authentic feedback to his team and is open to taking feedback from his peers. He was my go-to manager for large complex IT projects always delivering accurate estimates and project statuses. His skills include: team management, mentoring, project management, incident management, budgeting, communications verbal and written, integrity, and loyalty. I can only hope to recruit Jamie for  my next high performance team,
